name: SHARMEEN HAIRCARE CENTRE
address: 1st Floor, 57 Residency Road, Near Old Galaxy Theater, Bengaluru 560025, India

reviews.name: Sohail S
reviews.Comment: Amazing Andhra style biryani. I must confess it's the best biryani I ever had. Ambience is good(casual). Staff is concerned. Overall nice experience.

reviews.name: Travel Freak Blog
reviews.Comment: Their biryanis are awesome. I have tried Chicken Biryani, Meghana Special Biryani, and Mutton Biryani here. Every biryani has a nice flavor in it. Other dishes are also nice. Must try!

reviews.name: Anant Kaushik
reviews.Comment: I have visited the place a couple of times, and the only complaint I have with it is why the hell isn't such an awesome biryani place in Gurgaon.

reviews.name: Alice Brown
reviews.Comment: Amazing Asian food and great ambiance!

reviews.name: Bob White
reviews.Comment: Delicious food but a bit crowded.
